IndexPage.description: This is a basic example that demonstrates the usage of next-intl with the Next.js App Router. Try changing the locale in the top right corner and see how the content changes.
IndexPage.title: next-intl example

LocaleSwitcher.label: Change language

PathnamesPage.description:
The pathnames are internationalized too.

If you're using the default language English, you'll see /en/pathnames in the browser address bar on this page.

If you change the locale to German, the URL is localized accordingly (/de/pfadnamen).
PathnamesPage.title: Pathnames

Cart.title: Shopping Cart
Cart.taxNote: Taxes and shipping calculated at checkout

Footer.description: TrangBamboo - A leading brand/manufacturer of eco-friendly bamboo handicrafts with 15 years of experience. We take pride in offering nature-inspired products rooted in craftsmanship.

ShippingPolicy.title: Shipping Policy
ShippingPolicy.intro: We offer flexible delivery options suitable for both retail and wholesale orders.
ShippingPolicy.domestic: For retail orders, we use popular delivery services in Vietnam such as GHTK, GHN, and Viettel Post.
ShippingPolicy.bulk: For wholesale orders, we offer shipping by truck, train, or airplane depending on the agreed schedule and cost with the customer.

Warranty.title: Warranty Policy
Warranty.intro: We offer a 6-month warranty for retail products with manufacturing-related defects. Please note the following conditions:
Warranty.warranty1: The warranty period is valid from the purchase date stated on the invoice.
Warranty.warranty2: Applies only to defects resulting from manufacturing faults or production issues.
Warranty.warranty3: Warranty does not cover mold or mildew caused by improper storage. Handmade products should be kept in a dry, well-ventilated place and away from direct water contact.
Warranty.warranty4: Warranty is void if the product has been modified, misused, or tampered with.
Warranty.warranty5: Customers must provide proof of purchase and clear images of the defective product to process warranty support.

questions.question: Are bamboo baskets durable?
questions.answer: Our products are handcrafted from natural materials and can last for years if properly cared for.

questions.question: Can I use bamboo baskets to store food?
questions.answer: Yes, though we recommend using a liner or bag to avoid moisture, especially with fresh items.

questions.question: Will the basket develop mold over time?
questions.answer: If stored in a damp or poorly ventilated place, mold can develop. Please keep products in a dry, airy environment.

questions.question: Does TrangBamboo accept custom orders?
questions.answer: Yes, we accept custom designs, logos, or personalized requests for bulk orders.

questions.question: How long does delivery take?
questions.answer: Usually 3–5 days for retail orders. Wholesale shipping times vary based on quantity and delivery location.
